prompt:
Goal: Create a three-panel editorial fashion collage of hyper-realistic glamorous female Met Gala portraits inspired by Heavenly Bodies meets Futuristic Royalty, with the same anonymous woman transformed into three ultra-luxury haute couture looks. Faces should be intentionally anonymized with soft rectangular blur masks over each face, while the gowns, jewelry, lighting, and event atmosphere remain sharp and realistic.

Canvas: Wide horizontal triptych, 3:2 aspect ratio, divided into exactly 3 equal vertical panels with thin dark separators. Photorealistic DSLR red-carpet photography, shallow depth of field, warm indoor gala lighting, paparazzi flashes, luxury museum staircase and floral backdrops.

Panel count and contents: Exactly 3 full-body or near-full-body female fashion portraits.
1. Left panel: Front-facing woman on a red carpet wearing a dramatic deep crimson red strapless couture ball gown with a plunging sweetheart neckline, gold baroque embroidery, ornate beaded corset bodice, sheer red tulle skirt volume, and a sculptural bustle or train. She has long dark wavy hair, a diamond necklace and bracelet, one hand near her mouth and one hand resting near her waist. Background includes paparazzi, guests in formalwear, hedge greenery, red carpet, and bright camera lights.
2. Center panel: Rear three-quarter pose of the woman as an ethereal moon goddess wearing an icy silver white off-shoulder celestial couture gown with crystal beadwork, sheer shimmering cape, long flowing train, high slit, sparkling high heels, and embroidered crescent moon and star details on the translucent fabric. She looks back over her shoulder, holding the train lightly. Background is packed with photographers, white flowers, dark blue carpet with star motifs, and intense flash photography.
3. Right panel: Front-facing woman standing on an elegant staircase wearing a fitted black and antique gold off-shoulder mermaid gown with long sleeves, heavy symmetrical gold embroidery, celestial circular motifs on the bodice, structured neckline, narrow silhouette, and a small trailing train. Her hair is styled in a sleek low updo. Background includes cream marble stairs, red carpet runner, gold stanchions, guards or attendants in black suits, and warm wall sconces.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic, luxury fashion magazine editorial, Met Gala atmosphere, ornate couture construction, intricate metallic embroidery, sparkling crystals, cinematic warm highlights, realistic fabric textures, high dynamic range, elegant posing, polished celebrity-event photography.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 vertical panels and exactly 3 couture looks; no visible readable text, no logos, no watermark. Keep all faces anonymized with soft blur blocks. Do not add extra panels, extra subjects as main models, or cartoon styling.
